languages.text: Экраны древних машин пусты и темны, как глазницы мертвеца. Движущая Сила не наполняет их уже очень давно.

traits.locale_text: Экраны древних машин пусты и темны, как глазницы мертвеца. Движущая Сила не наполняет их уже очень давно.

languages.text: The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.
languages.original_text: Экраны древних машин пусты и темны, как глазницы мертвеца. Движущая Сила не наполняет их уже очень давно.

traits.locale_text: The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.
The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.
The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.

languages.text: 古き機械のスクリーンは、死者の眼窩のように空虚で暗く、機械の火花が長らく灯っていない。
languages.original_text: The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.

languages.text: Kadim mekanizmaların ekranları, ölü bir adamın göz çukurları kadar boş ve karanlık. Makine kıvılcımı, onları uzun zamandır doldurmamış.
languages.original_text: The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.

traits.locale_text: Kadim mekanizmaların ekranları, ölü bir adamın göz çukurları kadar boş ve karanlık. Makine kıvılcımı, onları uzun zamandır doldurmamış.

languages.text: 古老机械的屏幕如死者的眼窝般空洞漆黑，机械火花已许久未曾将其点亮。
languages.original_text: The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.

traits.locale_text: 古老机械的屏幕如死者的眼窝般空洞漆黑，机械火花已许久未曾将其点亮。

languages.text: Die Bildschirme der alten Mechanismen sind ebenso leer und dunkel wie die Augenhöhlen eines Toten. Sie waren schon lange nicht mehr vom Maschinenfunken erfüllt.
languages.original_text: The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.

traits.locale_text: Die Bildschirme der alten Mechanismen sind ebenso leer und dunkel wie die Augenhöhlen eines Toten. Sie waren schon lange nicht mehr vom Maschinenfunken erfüllt.

languages.text: Les écrans des anciens mécanismes sont aussi vides et sombres que les orbites d'un mort. L'étincelle de la machine n'y a rien affiché depuis bien longtemps.
languages.original_text: The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.

traits.locale_text: Les écrans des anciens mécanismes sont aussi vides et sombres que les orbites d'un mort. L'étincelle de la machine n'y a rien affiché depuis bien longtemps.

languages.text: Las pantallas de los antiguos mecanismos están tan vacías y oscuras como las cuencas oculares de un muerto. El espíritu máquina dejó de habitarlas hace mucho.
languages.original_text: The screens of the ancient mechanisms are as empty and dark as a dead man's eye sockets. The machine spark has not filled them for a long time.

traits.locale_text: Las pantallas de los antiguos mecanismos están tan vacías y oscuras como las cuencas oculares de un muerto. El espíritu máquina dejó de habitarlas hace mucho.
